title: Horse Whistle Reloaded
description: Allows you to summon your horse right to your side - A fork of the original mod "Horse Whistle"
body:
This mod is a fork of [Horse Whistle](https://modrinth.com/mod/horse-whistle) by [jbossjawlow](https://modrinth.com/user/jbossjaslow) This mod was created to fix a bug in the current 1.20.1 versions. I likely wont update this mod unless needed to, or if people want me to.

All assets and concepts credit goes to jbossjaslow. thank you for creating such an incredible mod!

- ORIGINAL DESCRIPTION -

This mod adds a horse whistle item. When used on your tamed horse, it registers that horse to the whistle. Then, you can right click again to summon your horse to you. If you wish to disconnect this item from the horse, simply crouch+right click.

This item can be enchanted!

Note: your horse must be in a loaded chunk to be teleported. This is a limitation imposed by Minecraft

The durability of the whistle and the distance your horse can teleport are both exposed as config options in the config file. This has ModMenu interaction as well.
